name: Dus June Kii Raat
overview: A farcical tale of Panauti, a hapless man with notorious bad luck, and his quest to reopen his father's theatre. Packed with hilarious misadventures and colorful characters, his journey with cousin Battu for love and luck is a hilarious.

trailers.title: Dus June Kii Raat | On 4th Aug | Tusshar Kapoor | Priyanka Chahar Choudhary | JioCinema Premium
